text_block_list.text:
I find Mihono Bourbon standing in the hallway in
a daze.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me... Cognitive abilities in decline.
Unable to recognize Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Cause may be... severe fatigue... from excessive
racing...

The fatigue from racing has started to hinder her
everyday life now. It might be best to adjust her
race schedule.
